//: Public, exposed setup-preset definitions. This shipped default is overridable per-repo by .evolve/setup-presets.json. The Go recommender is a generic interpreter: it reads these presets + the public .evolve/profiles/*.json defaults + live detection, and writes per-phase pins to the public .evolve/policy.json. No preset behavior is hardcoded in code.

presets.name: recommended
presets.description: Profile defaults, subscription-aware. Builder and Auditor run on different model families when you have two (adversarial integrity).

presets.name: economy
presets.description: One tier cheaper per phase wherever the envelope allows — lighter on quota and cost.

presets.name: max-quality
presets.description: Top of each phase's envelope — best quality, highest cost.
